comment: Example MCP server declarations for Grok Build CLI (stdio preferred for local orchestration). Merge or point Grok Build config at this (or equivalent mcporter.json). Narrow surfaces only. Pair with arifos-mcp-federation skill + A-FORGE leases + AAA A2A.

gb-federation-router._comment: Narrow orchestration planner/router. stdio for low blast radius. Use first for sequence planning across federation.

mcp-repo-read._comment: Narrow read tier (cognitive clarity focus). Evolved tools deliver summary-first, reasoning, related context, limitations, suggestions. query_context for synthesis.
mcp-repo-read.server_description: High-clarity read-only surface: repository structure, code symbols, ADRs with synthesis + proactive related context. Strictly bounded, evidence-based. Reduces cognitive load for Grok Build planning.

mcp-memory._comment: Narrow memory/governance. ADRs, Cooling Ledger, Dream summaries, F-floor search, rhythm. Escalate change to arifOS 888.
mcp-memory.server_description: Sovereign memory surface for reflection, ADRs, Cooling Ledger, Dream Engine, daily rhythm. Governance overlay.

mcp-arifos-kernel._comment: Narrow direct transport of arifOS constitutional kernel. Low entropy. Health, floors, rhythm, kernel memory, gated judgment entry, malam reflection writer.
mcp-arifos-kernel.server_description: arifOS kernel (floors, entropy, 888 entry, daily rhythm, sealed memory). Read-first. Escalate via 888/A2A. Optimal for Grok Build.

mcp-repo-write._comment: GATED write tier. All tools return HOLD requiring lease/888. Separate from read.
mcp-repo-write.server_description: Narrow gated writes (patch, branch, PR draft). Requires A-FORGE lease or arifOS 888 + A2A.

arifos._comment: arifOS constitutional kernel (governance, judge, vault, sense). Streamable HTTP or stdio bridge. Limit to read + judgment paths.
arifos.server_description: arifOS governance, 888 judgment, VAULT, floor enforcement. Evidence + control tier only.

aforge._comment: A-FORGE execution (7072 MCP). Use leases for scoping (equivalent to allowed_tools). Prefer dry-run + lease first.
aforge.server_description: Execution substrate: plan, build, test, lease-gated deploy. Change/execution tier. Always request lease with narrow scope.

geox.server_description: Earth evidence: basin, seismic, petrophysics, vision, claims. Read tier only.

wealth.server_description: Capital evidence (NPV, risk, stock, flow). Read tier only.

well.server_description: Vitality / human + system readiness. Read tier only.

github._comment: GitHub deep ops (already high-count). Register with tight allowed_tools in remote use.
github.server_description: Repo/PR/issue/actions. Prefer read + propose for most flows.

cloudflare._comment: Cloudflare plugin integration for DNS, Workers, KV, R2, AI. Installed per AF-2026-06-23 directive. Use for platform ops behind leases.
cloudflare.server_description: Cloudflare platform tools. Read tier preferred; writes require forge lease from canonical arifOS.

notes_for_grok_build.planner_first: Always call orchestrate_sequence (gb-federation) or arifos-mcp-federation skill before cross-tier work.
notes_for_grok_build.narrow_is_mandatory: When declaring to remote xAI, always supply allowed_tools. Omission = full surface in context (bad for tokens + risk).
notes_for_grok_build.leases: For anything beyond read in A-FORGE, first request lease with minimal scopes.
notes_for_grok_build.888_HOLD: Any T3 (prod deploy, secret, vault write, destructive, cross-org structural) requires 888 + explicit F13.
notes_for_grok_build.metrics: Emit via emit_federation_telemetry or arifos observability. Track selection precision, escalation, read/write ratio.
notes_for_grok_build.A2A_mesh: For cross-agent coordination or status use AAA A2A (discovery, handoff) rather than raw MCP when possible.
notes_for_grok_build.extension_surface: Bundle via .grok/plugins/ (see arif-narrow-mcp/plugin.toml) for /plugins /skills /hooks /mcps discovery. Skills become /slash commands. Hooks for pre/post policy.
